calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Debra Fox for Angela Hopper (Benificiary).
Daniel Bernhard for Trustee/Respondent.

Ms. Fox stated that the Beneficiary that is under an LPS conservatorship did not receive notice of the petition, however the response fully includes argument that was presented in the initial petition, that there really is no material lack of notice and that the Beneficiaries rights are not in anyway being prejudiced by having todays hearing. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not Ms. Hopper is entitled to receive information, whether she is Beneficiary or a Remainder Beneficiary, the impact on the Beneficiaries if the Trust has to pay for an accounting, whether or not the Trustee is mismanaging the property, how the amounts of rents that are being collected each month vary, the effect the amounts of rents will have on the market value of the property, the fiduciary duty of the Trustee to the Beneficiaries and the Remainder Beneficiaries to properly manage the trust property, payment of a credit card and a phone bill, etc. The Petition for Instructions for Determining Trust Language Regarding Income Distributions and to Compel Accountings is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox specially appearing for Attorney Gregory Menzel on behalf of Angela Hopper (Petitioner).
Daniel Bernhard for and with Helene Jeffrey (Trustee).

Ms. Fox stated that notice was given, that the proof of service was e-filed in the last couple of days, and that the Petitioner is a vested remainder beneficiary and is entitled to an accounting. Mr. Bernhard stated that there is an issue as to whether the Petitioner is a beneficiary, that she gets nothing until the trust terminates and that there is an issue as to the nature of the accounting. Mr. Bernhard also stated that the Trustee has been managing the property for the past 28-years, that no one has ever had any interest on how the Trustee was doing this, and raised the issue of cost to the Trust and the burden of doing an accounting. Ms. Fox stated that she would like the opportunity to provide further briefing. The Petition for Instructions for Determining Trust Language Regarding Income Distributions, etc. is continued to April 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Fox is to file her pleading by March 29, 2019. Mr. Bernhard is to file his reply by April 8, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Continued To Mar-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Menzel for Angela Hopper (Petitioner).
Daniel Bernhard appeared by telephone for Trustee.

Mr. Menzel stated that he would like the Court to order the Trustee to do an accounting for 2015 forward. Mr. Bernhard stated that the Petitioner is not a beneficiary under this trust and has no standing, that she receives nothing from this trust and that the Trustee has provided information to the Petitioner. Mr. Bernhard also stated that the same information was provided to the Beneficiaries, that the Trustee has also provided rent rolls that the Beneficiaries are not entitled to and that they won't agree to the tenants not receiving information regarding the amounts of rents. Mr. Menzel stated that his Client and her Sister are discretionary Beneficiaries, that under the code they are entitled to an accounting, that the building is severely under performing, that he believes the notice issue has been cleared up and that they sent notices to the addresses that were provided for every Beneficiary. The Court stated that Mr. Menzel and his Client are entitled to know where the Beneficiaries live and directed Mr. Bernhard to give the addresses to Mr. Menzel. The Petition for Instructions for Determining Trust Language Regarding Income Distributions, etc. is continued to March 20, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the proof of service. Any further pleadings are to be filed by March 6, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Menzel for Angela Hopper.
Daniel Bernhard for Helene Jeffrey (Trustee).

Mr. Bernhard stated that they have had discussion, that there has been some narrowing of issues, that he does not feel mediation is needed and that they can continue to do this on their own. Mr. Menzel stated that Mr. Bernhard has agreed to provide an accounting and rent rolls for 2016, 2017 and 2018. Mr. Bernhard stated that he needs to obtain agreement from his Client as to the rent rolls. The Petition for Instructions for Determining Trust Language Regarding Income Distributions and to Compel an Accounting is continued to January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Continued To Dec-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Nov-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions For Determining Trust Language Regarding Invome Distributions And To Compel An Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Continued To Sep-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Menzel for Angela Hopper (Petitioner).
Daniel Bernhard for and with Helene Jeffrey.

The Court questions why they don't have exact addresses for two of the Beneficiaries who live in the property that is owned by the Trust. Mr. Menzel stated that they have the building address, but no apartment numbers. Ms. Jeffrey stated that she has heard from the other beneficiaries, that there are ten Siblings, that they do not know where Thomas is, that he has medical issues, and he is estranged from his family. Ms. Jeffrey also stated that John Paul's apartment number is 205 and Kathleen's apartment number is 202. Counsel indicated that they are happy to do mediation and feel that the matter does not qualify for pro bono mediation because the value of the property exceeds $3,000,000.00. The Parties will do private mediation. The Petition for Instructions for Determining Trust Language, etc. is continued to September 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.
